schema:
import { z } from "zod";

const WidgetState = z.strictObject({
  searchQuery: z.string(),
  video1_title: z.string(),
  video1_channel: z.string(),
  video1_thumbnail: z.string(),
  video1_url: z.string(),
  video2_title: z.string(),
  video2_channel: z.string(),
  video2_thumbnail: z.string(),
  video2_url: z.string(),
  video3_title: z.string(),
  video3_channel: z.string(),
  video3_thumbnail: z.string(),
  video3_url: z.string(),
});

export default WidgetState;
template:
<Card size="sm" theme="light" confirmLabel="카카오톡 나와의 채팅방 전송" confirmAction="kakaomcp_send_to_me">
  <Col gap={3}>
    <Row justify="space-between" align="center">
      <Title value="추천 영상 목록" size="md" />
      <Badge label={searchQuery} />
    </Row>
    <Divider flush="true" />
    <ListView>
      <ListViewItem>
        <Row gap={3}>
          <Image src={video1_thumbnail} size={48} radius="md" />
          <Col>
            <Text value={video1_title} weight="bold" size="sm" />
            <Caption value={video1_channel} />
          </Col>
        </Row>
      </ListViewItem>
      <ListViewItem>
        <Row gap={3}>
          <Image src={video2_thumbnail} size={48} radius="md" />
          <Col>
            <Text value={video2_title} weight="bold" size="sm" />
            <Caption value={video2_channel} />
          </Col>
        </Row>
      </ListViewItem>
      <ListViewItem>
        <Row gap={3}>
          <Image src={video3_thumbnail} size={48} radius="md" />
          <Col>
            <Text value={video3_title} weight="bold" size="sm" />
            <Caption value={video3_channel} />
          </Col>
        </Row>
      </ListViewItem>
    </ListView>
  </Col>
</Card>

data.video1_title: AI 에이전트가 바꿀 우리의 미래 (10분 정리)
data.video2_title: OpenAI Realtime API 실전 코딩 가이드
data.video3_title: PlayMCP를 활용한 카카오톡 자동화 봇 만들기
